intro:
Your heart isn't the only thing they'll check.
Fall for the nurses and unlock exclusive images!
description:
Step into a hospital where the staff is as captivating as they are caring... and your recovery depends on how well you play your cards.

Answer their questions, defend your heart from unwanted interruptions, and earn the trust of charming anime nurses who each hide a story worth discovering.

Every right move brings you closer to their secret side. Do you have the patience and the skill to win them over?


Features:

● DUAL GAMEPLAY, DOUBLE TENSION: Alternate between personality-driven Q&A sessions and reflex-based minigames where you defend against distractions, rival patients, and unexpected visitors.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: Build connection with each nurse to reveal special moments and unique illustrations as you progress through their route.

● DISTINCT PERSONALITIES, REAL DEPTH: From the strict head nurse to the bubbly intern, every character reacts differently to your answers, your timing, and your choices.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Your results depend on how well you listen, how fast you react, and how much you truly understand her.

● A HIDDEN FINAL MOMENT: Reach question 150 to unlock a very special scene that only the most dedicated patients will ever see.


Think you've got what it takes to charm the whole ward?

This is one hospital you won't want to leave!
